title: 1.1: Tests that the homepage redirects a logged-out visitor to the locale-aware homepage URL where the locale path is included for non-English locales and omitted for English
1.2: Tests that the plans page redirects a logged-out visitor to the locale-aware pricing page URL where the locale path is included for non-English locales and omitted for English
1.3: Tests correctly handle English locale by omitting the locale prefix from the URL path while including it for non-English locales
2.1: Places the test for homepage locale-aware redirect verification in test/e2e/specs/i18n/
2.2: Places the logged-out locale redirect tests in test/e2e/specs/i18n/i18n__logged-out-redirect.ts
3.1: All tests use Playwright with Jest-style describe/it pattern for test organization
3.2: All tests follow the naming pattern using describe with 'I18N: <Feature> Redirect' format for i18n redirect tests
3.3: Uses a parameterized structure to run the same redirect assertions across multiple locales (e.g., it.each, describe.each, or loop-generated tests).
4.1: For each locale case, the test creates a Playwright page/context configured with that locale (e.g., browser.newPage({ locale }) or browser.newContext({ locale }) + context.newPage()).
4.2: Verifies the redirect destination using a URL-aware wait/assertion (e.g., page.waitForURL(...) or expect(page).toHaveURL(...)).
4.3: Homepage entry must start from the base Calypso URL (no locale param / no locale-prefixed path)
4.4: Plans entrypoint path must be plans/ with trailing slash
4.5: Plans destination must be pricing/ with trailing slash
